framework.name: AP2 September 2025 launch with GitHub spec available
framework.description: AP2 announced September 16, 2025 with public GitHub repo containing technical spec, docs, and reference implementations. This is further along than 'announced-only' — it has shipped artifacts. But no GA production timeline mentioned.
framework.raw_quote: visit our public GitHub repository to review the complete technical specification, documentation, and reference implementations

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
